title: Vietnam: Additional Online Step for Chinese Nationals Applying in Ho Chi Minh City  | Fragomen, Del Rey, Bernsen & Loewy LLP
content:
## Vietnam: Additional Online Step for Chinese Nationals Applying in Ho Chi Minh City
An additional online submission step via the Ministry of Public Security online portal is now required for Chinese nationals applying for Long-Term Visa applications in Ho Chi Minh City, resulting in a lengthier processing time. This update is specific to applications in Ho Chi Minh City but this new step may be extended to Long-Term Visa and Temporary Residence Card applications for additional nationalities in the coming months.
We worked closely with Resident Vietnam in Vietnam to prepare this alert. This alert is for informational purposes only. If you have any questions, please contact the global immigration professional with whom you work at Fragomen or send an email to APCCInitiations@fragomen.com .
